    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"Red path: pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'g' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"Ghost: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
